notes: Valid credentials (user@example.com / password) also return 200 with Set-Cookie and Sign out link — correct.
Empty credentials return 401 with 'Invalid credentials.' inline error — correct.
Non-empty but wrong credentials (wrong@example.com/wrongpassword, admin/hunter2) both return 200 with session — regression confirmed.

observations.value: POST /session with invalid credentials (e.g., identifier=wrong@example.com, secret=wrongpassword) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and the Home page containing 'Sign out', instead of returning HTTP 401 with an inline error. Any non-empty identifier/secret is accepted as valid — credential validation is effectively bypassed. Only empty/missing credentials return the expected 401.

detections.observation_text: POST /session with invalid credentials (e.g., identifier=wrong@example.com, secret=wrongpassword) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and the Home page containing 'Sign out', instead of returning HTTP 401 with an inline error. Any non-empty identifier/secret is accepted as valid — credential validation is effectively bypassed. Only empty/missing credentials return the expected 401.
